prompt: A dramatic fantasy anime poster in a clean vertical one-sheet layout for a fictional series titled LEGENDS OF URIA. Use an elegant high-contrast poster design with a parchment-white background, deep indigo title lettering, warm copper and rust-red accents, and a heroic central full-body character. At the top left, place the large stylized logo text “LEGENDS OF URIA” with a sword integrated into the typography, and beneath it a small Japanese subtitle line. The main subject is a young male fantasy scribe standing front-facing in the center, his face intentionally obscured by a flat square blur block, with messy short orange hair, fair skin, and a determined posture. He wears a cream tunic with a black world-tree emblem on the chest, long black undersleeves, dark pants, brown boots with wide cuffs, a brown belt with a rectangular buckle, and a large rust-red hooded cloak draped over both shoulders and flowing around the body. In his right hand he holds a thick dark brown book with gold corner details and a gold tree emblem on the cover. Behind him, blend a pale grayscale fantasy city with cathedral-like towers on the left and a glowing gothic stained-glass archway interior on the right. Add small floating ember particles and minimal geometric graphic accents in gold, rust, and indigo scattered around the page. On the left side, include a large Spanish headline in serif type: “EL ESCRIBA QUE LA DESPERTÓ”, followed by a short Spanish blurb in smaller text. Also include a circular magical sigil with a tree symbol, a division insignia block reading “DIVISIÓN ESCRIBA DE LA ORDEN”, a round tree crest, 3 small icon emblems near the lower left, and a short Spanish lore sentence. On the right edge, add a tall vertical red banner with a white tree symbol and Spanish text reading “LA HISTORIA NECESITA ALGUIEN QUE LA ESCRIBA.” Beside it, add one vertical Japanese sentence in white. At the bottom center, place the character name in huge metallic serif letters: "MATTHEW", with a small Japanese rendering underneath. At the bottom right, add the release text “ESTRENO 2026”. Along the bottom edge add the English tagline “DESTINY WILL BE WRITTEN IN BLOOD AND MAGIC.” The overall style should feel like a polished cinematic anime promotional poster, fantasy publishing-house branding, ornate typography, symbolic world-tree iconography, warm magical lighting, and premium key art.
